scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[1] Property not null check on non-null node
scenarios.description: [1] Property not null check on non-null node
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NOT NULL,
       n.exists IS NOT NULL

scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[2] Property not null check on optional non-null node
scenarios.description: [2] Property not null check on optional non-null node
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NOT NULL,
       n.exists IS NOT NULL
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported

scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[3] Property not null check on null node
scenarios.description: [3] Property not null check on null node
scenarios.query:
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)
RETURN n.missing IS NOT NULL
scenarios.skip_reason: binder: OPTIONAL MATCH not yet supported

scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[4] A literal null is not IS NOT null
scenarios.description: [4] A literal null is not IS NOT null
scenarios.query: RETURN null IS NOT NULL AS value

scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[5] IS NOT NULL on a map [map={name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'}, key=name, result=true]
scenarios.description: [5] IS NOT NULL on a map [map={name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'}, key=name, result=true]
scenarios.query:
WITH {name: 'Mats', name2: 'Pontus'} AS map
RETURN map.name IS NOT NULL AS result

scenarios.id: Null2 - IS NOT NULL validation-[6] IS NOT NULL is case insensitive
scenarios.description: [6] IS NOT NULL is case insensitive
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n:X)
RETURN n, n.prop Is noT nULl AS b
